commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=4e02c86dbaa1c307ddbaada31f648933850dddf9)
commands.review_summary:
The PR modifies `src/media/parse.ts` and `src/markdown/fences.ts` plus tests to skip `MEDIA:` extraction from indented code blocks, preserve retained code indentation, require whitespace-only fence closing lines, and make media token matching case-sensitive.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection of current main shows `splitMediaFromOutput` only protects fenced spans before trimming indentation and matching `MEDIA:`, so the indented-code false-positive path is clear without executing tests.
commands.review_followup: The PR needs author-supplied real behavior proof and maintainer review of the lowercase-media compatibility fix; ClawSweeper should not queue repair work because automation cannot provide the contributor's real setup proof.
